QueryVpcIntranetIp.privateIpAddresses: List of IP addresses to query; cannot be empty at the same time as privateIpRange; when both are present, privateIpRange takes precedence
QueryVpcIntranetIp.privateIpRange: IP range to query, in the format "192.168.0.1-192.168.0.5"; cannot be empty at the same time as privateIpAddresses; when both are present, privateIpRange takes precedence
